things.name: Montagne de Bueren Staircase
things.description: 374 steps climbing steeply above the city to the Citadel; a famous Liege landmark offering stunning rooftop views over the Meuse valley

things.name: Grand Curtius Museum
things.description: Magnificent museum in six linked historic mansions on the Meuse with encyclopedic collections of Mosan art, arms, glass, archaeology and religious art

things.name: Saint-Lambert Square
things.description: Liege's central square where the prince-bishops' palace faces a modern square built above the excavated ruins of the medieval Cathedral of St. Lambert

things.name: Liege-Guillemins Station
things.description: Santiago Calatrava's breathtaking glass and steel railway station from 2009; one of Europe's most spectacular pieces of contemporary architecture

things.name: En Feronstrée Sunday Market
things.description: One of Belgium's most famous markets held along the Meuse quays every Sunday with antiques, bric-a-brac and local produce in a lively outdoor setting

things.name: Museum of Walloon Life
things.description: Ethnographic museum in a 17th-century Franciscan convent celebrating Walloon culture, craft traditions and the regional identity of French-speaking Belgium

things.name: Prince-Bishop's Palace
things.description: Magnificent Renaissance palace of 1508 with three superb inner courtyards; once the residence of Liege's powerful prince-bishops, now the Palace of Justice

things.name: Liege Christmas Market
things.description: One of Belgium's most beloved Christmas markets, Liege en Fetes fills the city centre with wooden chalets, mulled wine and traditional Walloon treats each December

things.name: Outremeuse District
things.description: Liege's bohemian island neighbourhood on the right bank of the Meuse; birthplace of Georges Simenon, creator of Maigret, with colourful bars and the August Folklore festival

things.name: Stade de Sclessin
things.description: Home of Standard de Liege with 27,670 capacity; one of Belgium's great clubs with 10 league titles and multiple Europa League group stage appearances
